blocks.text: The --font emoji shortcut registers the bundled Noto Emoji (monochrome) font. Unlike --font color-emoji (COLRv1 vector colour), this renders emoji as single-colour glyphs that follow the surrounding text colour — ideal for print, faxable documents, and archives that must stay grayscale.

items: --font emoji — monochrome Noto Emoji, inherits text colour
Both register through the same --font / --lang shortcut mechanism

metadata.subject: Monochrome emoji demonstrating the --font emoji shortcut
